title: chore(shared): delete dead modules, schemas, and unused registry helpers
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Delete dead modules: `extractFromRequest.js` (247 lines) + README refs, and `ipLogger.js`
- Remove three unused `create*Usage` wrappers and the dead OpenAI streaming-response schema chain
- Drop unused registry exports (`getModelAliases`, `getEmbeddingModels`/`getRealtimeModels` getters) and tighten `getModelInfo` visibility

Verified non-breaking: biome clean, affected tests green vs the main baseline. Net âˆ’363 lines.

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the shared codebase
gist.blurb: We swept away some dusty, unused code in our shared libraries to keep the hive running lean and mean.
gist.summary: Removed 363 lines of dead code from the shared package, including unused modules like extractFromRequest.js and ipLogger.js, obsolete usage wrappers, and dead OpenAI schemas.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup reduces technical debt and simplifies the shared registry and schema definitions for developers.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating old, dusty code printouts while Polly the bee helps sweep up the area, representing dead code removal and repository cleanup.
